session.user:
Run pytest on the navigation test files and report results: 1. `pytest tests/commands/navigation/test_up.py -x -v` 2. `pytest tests/commands/navigation/test_down.py -x -v`
Report the full output of any failures.
session.assistant: I'll run both pytest commands for the navigation test files and report the results.
